matrix.criterion: deploy/k8s/ contains a Deployment+Service for each of engine, api, agents, ui, plus namespace/config/secret-template manifests
matrix.method: static: ls deploy/k8s/, kubectl apply --dry-run=client -f deploy/k8s/ (schema validity)

matrix.criterion: kind (or k3d) cluster actually created in this sandbox
matrix.method: executed: kind create cluster, kubectl cluster-info against it

matrix.criterion: kubectl apply -f deploy/k8s/ succeeds and all 4 pods reach Ready
matrix.method: executed: kubectl apply, kubectl get pods -n hivemind -w until all Ready, kubectl get pods -o wide capture

matrix.criterion: api's /health endpoint reachable through the cluster (matches 6.2.2 smoke test's api check)
matrix.method: executed: kubectl port-forward svc/api 8080:8080 & curl localhost:8080/health, expect 200 'ok'

matrix.criterion: ui's / endpoint reachable through the cluster and serves the SPA shell (matches 6.2.2 smoke test's ui check)
matrix.method: executed: kubectl port-forward svc/ui 8081:80 & curl localhost:8081/, grep '<div id="root">'

matrix.criterion: env vars / service DNS names translated correctly (agents reachable at agents:50052 from api's perspective, engine at engine:50051 from api/agents)
matrix.method: executed: kubectl logs on api/agents pods checked for connection errors to engine/agents service names; kubectl exec a debug pod to nslookup engine/agents service names inside the cluster

matrix.criterion: no message queue / architecture change introduced
matrix.method: static: diff review -- only Deployment/Service/ConfigMap/Secret/Namespace k8s objects added, no new engine/api/agents/ui source changes

matrix.criterion: OCI provisioning script exists, is shell-syntax-valid, and is explicitly marked unverified-against-live-OCI
matrix.method: static: bash -n deploy/oci/provision.sh; grep for the unverified-disclosure comment

matrix.criterion: kind cluster cleanly torn down after validation, no dangling resources left running
matrix.method: executed: kind delete cluster, docker ps confirms no leftover kind node containers

note: This matrix is self-consistency scope only (internal sanity), per invariant I4 -- NOT a substitute for /cdr:verify.
